---
title: "Measuring Spatial Visibility, Adjacency, Permeability and Degrees of Street Life in Pompeii"
author: "Akkelies van Nes"
description: "An analytical mapping method created by Giambattista Nolli"
categories: [map based]
date-format: "YYYY"
date: "2011"
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

![](../../images/pompeii.jpg)

to be added
